templates.title: Work links → work browser profile
templates.description: Jira, ClickUp, and Google Workspace open in a browser profile you pick.

templates.title: Zoom links → Zoom app
templates.description: Meeting links open the native Zoom app instead of a browser tab.

templates.title: Spotify links → Spotify app
templates.description: Tracks, albums, and playlists open in the Spotify app.

templates.title: Links from Terminal → your dev browser
templates.description: URLs clicked in Terminal or iTerm open in Chrome (handy for localhost).
